title: Veterinary Drugs Committees - Canada.ca
content:
## Veterinary Drugs Committees

## Canadian Animal Feed and Health Products Engagement Committee (CAFHPEC)
The Canadian Animal Feed and Health Products Engagement Committee (CAFHPEC) provides the Health Products and Food Branch , in addition to the Canadian Food Inspection Agency (CFIA) with stakeholder input into the Canadian regulatory system for animal health products (veterinary biologics, veterinary drugs) and animal feed, from the perspective of regulated parties and stakeholders who are directly or indirectly impacted by the regulatory system.

## Expert Advisory Committee on Veterinary Natural Health Products
The Expert Advisory Committee on Veterinary Natural Health Products (EAC-vNHP) provides the Health Products and Food Branch with recommendations regarding policies related to the development of a suitable regulatory approach for veterinary natural health products.

## Advisory Committee on Animal Uses of Antimicrobials and Impact on Resistance and Human Health
The Advisory Committee on Animal Uses of Antimicrobials and Impact on Resistance and Human Health was formed to provide advice and assistance to the Director General, Veterinary Drugs Directorate, in the development of policy options related to the animal uses of antimicrobial agents.
This committee is dormant. For materials from past meetings, please contact the Veterinary Drugs Directorate .
